Author: LastOnionKnight
Name: Tonberry Tactics
Description: In-game half of Tonberry Tactics. v1.0.0 brings the Track 2 (ember/frost-blue) visual era with the Plan tab repainted. Provides doubled-frame card chrome plus the ember/frost-blue palette. Core and Web at v1.0.0 lockstep.
Punchline: BiS planner, Materia Advisor, and round-trip optimizer for FFXIV. The in-game half of Tonberry Tactics; coexists with CharacterPanelRefined.
